headline: A Look At M&T Bank (MTB) Valuation After Strong Q1 Results And Share Repurchases
summary: M&T Bank (MTB) shares have been in focus after the company reported first quarter 2026 results, with 6.1% sales growth, stronger earnings, healthier credit metrics, and sizeable share repurchases. See our latest analysis for M&T Bank. The stronger first quarter and improving credit metrics appear to be feeding into sentiment, with a 10.42% 1 month share price return and a 40.67% 1 year total shareholder return suggesting momentum has been building over time. If M&T Bank’s recent move has you...
